topic: identifying independent and dependent variables in linear equations
latex:
The cost of a phone plan is represented by the equation $c = 0.1t + 5$, where $c$ is the cost per month and $t$ is the number of texts sent and received per month.

Identify the independent and dependent variables.

The independent variable is \underline{\hspace{3cm}} and the dependent variable is \underline{\hspace{3cm}}.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
number of texts sent and received & total monthly cost \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: The independent variable is number of texts sent and received and the dependent variable is total monthly cost.
